name: Device
schema:
{
	"data": {
		"farm_uuid": str, 							# Unique identifier of the device's farm (Mandatory)
		"uuid": str, 								# Unique identifier of the device (Mandatory)
		"facility_uuid": str, 						# Unique identifier of the device's facility (Optional)
		"name": str, 								# Name of the device (Mandatory)
		"code": str, 								# Unique code of the device (Optional)
		"status": Status,							# Whether the device is active or not (Mandatory)
		"device_type": DeviceType, 					# Determines the device's type (Mandatory)
		"unit_measurement": UnitMeasurementType, 	# Annotation for an expected unit of measurement for the device (Mandatory)
		"source_user": str, 						# Unique identifier of the user or application which filled in the event data (Inferred: From the Event's "source_user" parameter)
		"event_versioning": { 						# Stores versions of each event that manipulated the Entity directly (Inferred: From the Event's "version" parameter)
			"register": str, 						# Stores version of the only register operation that created the Entity, if any (Inferred: From the Event's "version" parameter)
			"update": list[str], 					# Stores versions of the update operations that updated the Entity, if any (Inferred: From the Event's "version" parameter)
			"deletion": str,						# Stores version of the only deletion operation that deleted the Entity, if any (Inferred: From the Event's "version" parameter)
			"reprocess": list[str] 					# Stores versions of the reprocess operations that reprocessed the Entity, if any (Inferred: From the Event's "version" parameter)
		},
		"og_created_at": datetime, 					# Original date of creation of this data before migration - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Inferred: From the Event's "og_created_at" parameter)
		"og_updated_at": datetime 					# Original date of update of this data before migration - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Inferred: From the Event's "og_updated_at" parameter)
	}
}

name: Egg Group
schema:
{
	"data": {
		"farm_uuid": str, 									# Unique identifier of the egg group's farm (Mandatory)
		"date": datetime, 									# From which month and year this egg group document holds events - %Y-%m-%d (Inferred: From current date)
		"source_user": str, 								# Unique identifier of the user or application which filled in the event data (Inferred: From the Event's "source_user" parameter)
		"event_versioning": { 								# Stores versions of each event that manipulated the Entity directly (Inferred: From the Event's "version" parameter)
			"reprocess": list[str] 							# Stores versions of the reprocess operations that reprocessed the Entity, if any (Inferred: From the Event's "version" parameter)
		},
		"og_created_at": datetime, 							# Original date of creation of this data before migration - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Inferred: From the Event's "og_created_at" parameter)
		"og_updated_at": datetime, 							# Original date of update of this data before migration - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Inferred: From the Event's "og_updated_at" parameter),
		"holding_uuid": str,								# Unique identifier of the egg group's holding (Inferred: From the Egg Group's Farm)
		"holdings": list[str],								# Unique identifiers of the animal group's holdings (Inferred: From the Egg Group's Farm)
		"regions": list[str],								# Unique identifiers of the animal group's regions (Inferred: From the Egg Group's Farm)
		"producers": list[str],								# Unique identifiers of the animal group's producers (Inferred: From the Egg Group's Farm)
		"farm_name": str,									# The egg group's farm name (Inferred: From the Egg Group's Farm)
		"egg_grades": list[str], 							# List with the egg grades used on the egg group (Inferred: From the Egg Group's Regrade events)
		"hatchable_stock": [{ 								# Holds stock information regarding the stock of hatchable eggs (Inferred: From the Egg Group's Regrade, Incubation and Loss events)
			"farm_origin_uuid": str, 						# Unique identifier of the farm that produced the eggs (Mandatory)
			"ag_origin_uuid": str, 							# Unique identifier of the animal group that produced the eggs (Mandatory)
			"total_ag_origin": int, 						# Total number of hatchable eggs in stock for a given animal group of origin (Mandatory)
			"production_dates": [{
				"production_date": str, 					# When the animal group produced this set of eggs (Mandatory)
				"total_production_date": int, 				# Total number of hatchable eggs in stock for a given animal group of origin and production date (Mandatory)
				"egg_types": [{
					"egg_type": AnimalGroupEggType, 		# Which type the eggs were regraded to (Mandatory)
					"total_egg_type": int 		# Total number of hatchable eggs in stock for a given animal group of origin, production date and egg type (Mandatory)
				}]
			}],
			"egg_types": [{
				"egg_type": AnimalGroupEggType, 			# Which type the eggs were regraded to (Mandatory)
				"total_egg_type": int 		# Total number of hatchable eggs in stock for a given animal group of origin and egg type (Mandatory)
			}]
		}],
		"incubated_stock_ag": [{ 							# Holds stock information regarding the stock of incubated eggs for animal groups (Inferred: From the Egg Group's Incubation, Chick Grade and Loss events)
			"farm_origin_uuid": str, 						# Unique identifier of the farm that produced the eggs (Mandatory)
			"ag_origin_uuid": str, 							# Unique identifier of the animal group that produced the eggs (Mandatory)
			"total_ag_origin": int, 						# Total number of incubated eggs in stock for a given animal group of origin (Mandatory)
			"production_dates": [{
				"production_date": str, 					# When the animal group produced this set of eggs (Mandatory)
				"total_production_date": int, 				# Total number of incubated eggs in stock for a given animal group of origin and production date (Mandatory)
				"egg_types": [{
					"egg_type": AnimalGroupEggType, 		# Which were the type of eggs being incubated (Mandatory)
					"total_egg_type": int 					# Total number of incubated eggs in stock for a given animal group of origin, production date and egg type (Mandatory)
				}]
			}],
			"egg_types": [{
				"egg_type": AnimalGroupEggType, 			# Which were the type of eggs being incubated (Mandatory)
				"total_egg_type": int 						# Total number of incubated eggs in stock for a given animal group of origin and egg type (Mandatory)
			}]
		}],
		"incubated_stock_ic": [{ 							# Holds stock information regarding the stock of incubated eggs for incubators (Inferred: From the Egg Group's Incubation, Chick Grade and Loss events)
			"incubator_uuid": str, 							# Unique identifier of the farm's incubator equipment (Mandatory)
			"total_incubator": int, 						# Total number of incubated eggs in stock for a given incubator (Mandatory)

				"farm_origin_uuid": str, 					# Unique identifier of the farm that produced the eggs (Mandatory)
				"ag_origin_uuid": str, 						# Unique identifier of the animal group that produced the eggs (Mandatory)
				"total_ag_origin": int, 					# Total number of incubated eggs in stock for a given incubator and animal group of origin (Mandatory)
				"production_dates": [{
					"production_date": str, 				# When the animal group produced this set of eggs (Mandatory)
					"total_production_date": int, 			# Total number of incubated eggs in stock for a given incubator, animal group of origin and production date (Mandatory)
					"egg_types": [{
						"egg_type": AnimalGroupEggType, 	# Which were the type of eggs being incubated (Mandatory)
						"total_egg_type": int 				# Total number of incubated eggs in stock for a given incubator, animal group of origin, production date and egg type (Mandatory)
					}]
				}],
				"egg_types": [{
					"egg_type": AnimalGroupEggType, 		# Which were the type of eggs being incubated (Mandatory)
					"total_egg_type": int 					# Total number of incubated eggs in stock for a given incubator, animal group of origin and egg type (Mandatory)
				}]
			}],
			"production_dates": [{
				"production_date": str, 					# When the animal group produced this set of eggs (Mandatory)
				"total_production_date": int, 				# Total number of incubated eggs in stock for a given incubator and production date (Mandatory)
				"egg_types": [{
					"egg_type": AnimalGroupEggType, 		# Which were the type of eggs being incubated (Mandatory)
					"total_egg_type": int 					# Total number of incubated eggs in stock for a given incubator, production date and egg type (Mandatory)
				}]
			}],
			"egg_types": [{
				"egg_type": AnimalGroupEggType, 			# Which were the type of eggs being incubated (Mandatory)
				"total_egg_type": int 						# Total number of incubated eggs in stock for a given incubator and egg type (Mandatory)
			}]
		}],
		"hatched_stock": [{ 								# Holds stock information regarding the stock of hatched chicks (Inferred: From the Egg Group's Chick Grade and Chick Shipment Load events)

				"egg_types": [{
					"egg_type": AnimalGroupEggType, 		# Which type the eggs were regraded to (Mandatory)

						"gender": GroupGender, 				# Whether the gender of the chicks are not defined, all male, all female or mixed (Mandatory)
						"total_gender": int 				# Total number of hatchable eggs in stock for a given animal group of origin, production date, egg type and gender (Mandatory)
					}]
				}]
			}],
			"egg_types": [{
				"egg_type": AnimalGroupEggType, 			# Which type the eggs were regraded to (Mandatory)
				"total_egg_type": int, 						# Total number of hatchable eggs in stock for a given animal group of origin and egg type (Mandatory)

name: Farm
schema:
{
	"data": {
		"external_id": str,									# An identifier used by third party services to identify the data (Optional)
		"uuid": str,										# Unique identifier of the farm (Mandatory)

			"account_uuid": str,							# Unique identifier of the holding's account (Optional)
			"regions": list[str],							# Unique identifiers of the holding's regions (Optional)
			"producers": list[str],							# Unique identifiers of the holding's producers (Optional)

			"lead_technician_uuid": str, 					# Which is the farm's supervising technician between all of its registered ones (Optional)
			"is_holder": bool 								# If the holding is the one that originated the farm or not (Mandatory)
		}],
		"name": str,										# Name of the farm (Optional)
		"country_uuid": str, 								# Unique identifier of the farm's country (Mandatory)
		"adm_division_uuid": str, 							# Unique identifier of the farm's administrative division (Mandatory)
		"city_uuid": str, 									# Unique identifier of the farm's city (Mandatory)
		"latitude": float, 									# Latitude of the farm's location (Optional)
		"longitude": float, 								# Longitude of the farm's location (Optional)
		"timezone": Timezone, 								# Timezone configure for the farm, if any (Optional)
		"average_birth_weight": float, 						# Average animal birth weight of the farm's animals (Optional)
		"is_verticalized": bool, 							# If the farm is verticalized or not (Mandatory)
		"handles_saleable_deaths": bool, 					# If the farm handles saleable deaths or not (Optional)
		"work_year_start": int, 							# The farm's starting day of work for the year (Optional)
		"work_week_start": DaysOfWeek, 						# The farm's starting day of work for the week (Optional)
		"work_year_ref": FarmWorkYearReference, 			# The farm's work year reference, if its value is based on the week's day or year's calendar, etc (Optional)
		"mating_group_intervals": [{						# The set of intervals for the farm's mating group (Optional)
			"mg_start_date": datetime, 						# Start date of the first occurence of the mating group (Optional)
			"mg_interval": MatingGroupInterval.FOURTEEN 	# Informs the interval of time between groups (Mandatory)

		"production_stages": list[ProductionStage], 		# Based on the set of species and production stages which are taken care of on the farm (Mandatory)

			}

name: Holding Monthly
schema:
{
	"data": {
		"holding_uuid": str, 		# Unique identifier of the holding monthly's holding (Mandatory)
		"date": datetime, 			# From which month and year this holding monthly document holds events - %Y-%m-%d (Inferred: From current date)
		"source_user": str, 		# Unique identifier of the user or application which filled in the event data (Inferred: From the Event's "source_user" parameter)
		"event_versioning": { 		# Stores versions of each event that manipulated the Entity directly (Inferred: From the Event's "version" parameter)
			"reprocess": list[str] 	# Stores versions of the reprocess operations that reprocessed the Entity, if any (Inferred: From the Event's "version" parameter)
		},
		"og_created_at": datetime, 	# Original date of creation of this data before migration - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Inferred: From the Event's "og_created_at" parameter)
		"og_updated_at": datetime, 	# Original date of update of this data before migration - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Inferred: From the Event's "og_updated_at" parameter)
		"inputs": [
			{
				"external_id": str, 					# An identifier used by third party services to identify the data (Optional)
				"uuid": str, 							# Unique identifier of the holding's input event (Mandatory)
				"origin_type": PartnerType,				# Identifies the type of the origin, if any (Optional)
				"origin_uuid": str, 					# Unique identifier of the origin which provided the animals for the holding, if any (Optional)
				"ag_origin_uuid": str, 					# Unique identifier of the animal group of the origin which provided the animals for the holding, if any (Optional)
				"destination_type": PartnerType,		# Identifies the type of the destination, if any (Optional)
				"destination_uuid": str, 				# Unique identifier of the destination which will receive the animals, if any (Optional)
				"ag_destination_uuid": str, 			# Unique identifier of the animal group of the destination which will receive the animals, if any (Optional)
				"date": datetime, 						# When the holding received an input process - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Mandatory)
				"quantity": int, 						# Number of animals that the holding received on the input process (Mandatory)
				"invoice_number": str, 					# Number that identifies the invoice uniquelly (Optional)
				"invoice_value": float, 				# Value of the invoice (Optional)
				"h_animal_type": HoldingAnimalType, 	# Which is the type of animals that were received on the input (Mandatory)
				"h_txn_type": HoldingTxnType, 			# An optional parameter determining which is the type of transaction of the input (Mandatory)
				"is_origin_continuous": bool, 			# An optional flag determining if the origin is a continuous animal group or a common one (Optional)
				"is_dest_continuous": bool, 			# An optional flag determining if the destination is a continuous animal group or a common one (Optional)
				"source_user": str, 					# Unique identifier of the user or application which filled in the event data (Inferred: From the Event's "source_user" parameter)
				"event_versioning": { 					# Stores versions of each event that manipulated the bucket's entry directly (Inferred: From the Event's "version" parameter)
					"register": str, 					# Stores version of the only register operation that created the bucket's entry, if any (Inferred: From the Event's "version" parameter)
					"update": list[str], 				# Stores versions of the update operations that updated the bucket's entry, if any (Inferred: From the Event's "version" parameter)
					"deletion": str						# Stores version of the only deletion operation that deleted the bucket's entry, if any (Inferred: From the Event's "version" parameter)
				},
				"og_created_at": datetime, 				# Original date of creation of this data before migration - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Inferred: From the Event's "og_created_at" parameter)
				"og_updated_at": datetime, 				# Original date of update of this data before migration - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Inferred: From the Event's "og_updated_at" parameter)
				"is_deleted": bool, 					# Determines whether the input should be considered deleted or not (Mandatory)
				"created_at": datetime, 				# When the input was added - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Mandatory)
				"updated_at": datetime 					# When the input was last updated - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Mandatory)
			}
		],
		"input_schedules": [
			{
				"external_id": str, 						# An identifier used by third party services to identify the data (Optional)
				"uuid": str, 								# Unique identifier of the holding's input schedule event (Mandatory)
				"origin_type": PartnerType,					# Identifies the type of the origin, if any (Optional)
				"origin_uuid": str, 						# Unique identifier of the origin which will provide the animals for the holding, if any (Optional)
				"ag_origin_uuid": str, 						# Unique identifier of the animal group of the origin which provided the animals for the holding, if any (Optional)
				"destination_type": PartnerType,			# Identifies the type of the destination, if any (Optional)
				"destination_uuid": str, 					# Unique identifier of the destination which will receive the animals, if any (Optional)

name: Measurement
schema:
{
	"data": {
		"farm_uuid": str, 			# Unique identifier of the measurement's farm (Mandatory)
		"device_uuid": str, 		# Unique identifier of the device (Mandatory)
		"date": datetime, 			# From which month and year this measurement document holds events - %Y-%m-%d (Inferred: From current date)
		"source_user": str, 		# Unique identifier of the user or application which filled in the event data (Inferred: From the Event's "source_user" parameter)
		"event_versioning": { 		# Stores versions of each event that manipulated the Entity directly (Inferred: From the Event's "version" parameter)
			"reprocess": list[str] 	# Stores versions of the reprocess operations that reprocessed the Entity, if any (Inferred: From the Event's "version" parameter)
		},
		"og_created_at": datetime, 	# Original date of creation of this data before migration - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Inferred: From the Event's "og_created_at" parameter)
		"og_updated_at": datetime, 	# Original date of update of this data before migration - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Inferred: From the Event's "og_updated_at" parameter)
		"hydrometers": [
			{
				"uuid": str, 								# Unique identifier of the measurement of a hydrometer event (Mandatory)
				"animal_group_uuid": str, 					# Unique identifier of the measurement of a hydrometer's animal group (Optional)
				"facility_uuid": str, 						# Unique identifier of the measurement of a hydrometer's facility (Optional)
				"date": datetime, 							# When the measurement received a measurement of a hydrometer process - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Mandatory)
				"value": float, 							# Which was the measured value of the measurement of a hydrometer process (Mandatory)
				"first_value": bool, 						# If this reading should be considered the first measured value (Optional)
				"total_value": float, 						# Which is the current total value of all measurements (Optional)
				"animal_quantity": int, 					# The number of animals at the moment of the measurement (Optional)
				"animal_group_age": int, 					# The animal group's age when the measurement was made (Optional)
				"unit_measurement": UnitMeasurementType, 	# The unit of measurement for the value (Mandatory)
				"source_user": str, 						# Unique identifier of the user or application which filled in the event data (Inferred: From the Event's "source_user" parameter)
				"event_versioning": { 						# Stores versions of each event that manipulated the bucket's entry directly (Inferred: From the Event's "version" parameter)
					"register": str, 						# Stores version of the only register operation that created the bucket's entry, if any (Inferred: From the Event's "version" parameter)
					"update": list[str], 					# Stores versions of the update operations that updated the bucket's entry, if any (Inferred: From the Event's "version" parameter)
					"deletion": str							# Stores version of the only deletion operation that deleted the bucket's entry, if any (Inferred: From the Event's "version" parameter)
				},
				"og_created_at": datetime, 					# Original date of creation of this data before migration - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Inferred: From the Event's "og_created_at" parameter)
				"og_updated_at": datetime, 					# Original date of update of this data before migration - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Inferred: From the Event's "og_updated_at" parameter)
				"is_deleted": bool, 						# Determines whether the measurement of a hydrometer should be considered deleted or not (Mandatory)
				"created_at": datetime, 					# When the measurement of a hydrometer was added - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Mandatory)
				"updated_at": datetime 						# When the measurement of a hydrometer was last updated - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Mandatory)
			}
		]
	}
}

name: Supply
schema:
{
	"data": {
		"farm_uuid": str, 				# Unique identifier of the supply's farm (Mandatory)
		"date": datetime, 				# From which month and year this supply document holds events - %Y-%m-%d (Inferred: From current date)
		"source_user": str, 			# Unique identifier of the user or application which filled in the event data (Inferred: From the Event's "source_user" parameter)
		"event_versioning": { 			# Stores versions of each event that manipulated the Entity directly (Inferred: From the Event's "version" parameter)
			"reprocess": list[str] 		# Stores versions of the reprocess operations that reprocessed the Entity, if any (Inferred: From the Event's "version" parameter)
		},
		"og_created_at": datetime, 		# Original date of creation of this data before migration - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Inferred: From the Event's "og_created_at" parameter)
		"og_updated_at": datetime, 		# Original date of update of this data before migration - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Inferred: From the Event's "og_updated_at" parameter)
		"is_verticalized": bool, 		# If the farm is verticalized or not (Inferred: From the Supply's Farm)
		"holding_uuid": str,			# Unique identifier of the supply's holding (Inferred: From the Supply's Farm)
		"holdings": list[str],			# Unique identifiers of the supply's holdings (Inferred: From the Supply's Farm)
		"regions": list[str],			# Unique identifiers of the supply's regions (Inferred: From the Supply's Farm)
		"producers": list[str],			# Unique identifiers of the supply's producers (Inferred: From the Supply's Farm)
		"farm_name": str,				# The supply's farm name (Inferred: From the Supply's Farm)
		"feed_stock": [{ 				# Holds stock information regarding the stock of feed supply (Inferred: From the Supply's Input, Output, Consumption and Multiple Consumption events)
			"supply_uuid": str, 		# Unique identifier of the type of the supplies (Mandatory)
			"total_supply": float, 		# Total number of the supply in stock for a given supply type (Mandatory)

name: Technician
schema:
{
	"data": {
		"external_id": str, 				# An identifier used by third party services to identify the data (Optional)
		"holding_uuid": str, 				# Unique identifier of the technician's holding (Mandatory)
		"uuid": str, 						# Unique identifier of the technician (Mandatory)
		"date": datetime, 					# From which month and year this technician document holds events - %Y-%m-%d (Inferred: From current date)
		"user_uuid": str, 					# Unique identifier of the user associated with the technician registration (Optional)
		"name": str, 						# Name attributed to the technician (Mandatory)
		"email": str, 						# E-mail associated with the user and technician registration (Optional)
		"technician_type": TechnicianType, 	# The technician's typing (Mandatory)
		"status": Status,					# Whether the technician is active or not (Mandatory)
		"source_user": str, 				# Unique identifier of the user or application which filled in the event data (Inferred: From the Event's "source_user" parameter)
		"event_versioning": { 				# Stores versions of each event that manipulated the Entity directly (Inferred: From the Event's "version" parameter)
			"register": str, 				# Stores version of the only register operation that created the Entity, if any (Inferred: From the Event's "version" parameter)
			"update": list[str], 			# Stores versions of the update operations that updated the Entity, if any (Inferred: From the Event's "version" parameter)
			"deletion": str,				# Stores version of the only deletion operation that deleted the Entity, if any (Inferred: From the Event's "version" parameter)
			"reprocess": list[str] 			# Stores versions of the reprocess operations that reprocessed the Entity, if any (Inferred: From the Event's "version" parameter)

name: Animal - Swine - Male - Default
schema:
{
	"data": {
		"farm_uuid": str, 					# Unique identifier of the animal's farm (Inferred: From the Entity's Events that deal with movement such as Animal Output)
		"animal_group_uuid": str, 			# Unique identifier of the animal's animal group (Inferred: From the Entity's Events that deal with movement such as Animal Output)
		"uuid": str, 						# Unique identifier of the animal (Mandatory)
		"page": int, 						# Used to order documents of the animal entity (Inferred: From the Event's previous existing documents)
		"scrapped": bool, 					# Determines if the page is scrapped or not, indicating that it should be overlooked (Inferred: From the deletion of trigger Events)
		"date": datetime, 					# From which month and year this animal document holds events - %Y-%m-%d (Inferred: From the Event's reference date that was used to create the document)
		"facility_uuid": str, 				# Unique identifier of the animal's facility (Inferred: From the Entity's Events that deal with movement such as Animal Output)
		"pen_uuid": str, 					# Unique identifier of the animal's pen (Inferred: From the Entity's Events that deal with movement such as Animal Output)
		"origin_type": PartnerType, 		# Identifies the type of the origin, if any (Optional)
		"origin_uuid": str, 				# Unique identifier of the origin which provided the animal, if any (Optional)
		"ag_origin_uuid": str, 				# Unique identifier of the animal group that provided the animal (Optional)
		"fac_origin_uuid": str, 			# Unique identifier of the animal group's facility (Optional)
		"cycle": int, 						# Which is the animal's cycle (Inferred: From the Entity's trigger Events)
		"age": int, 						# Age of the animal (Optional)
		"gestation_days": int, 				# Number of days that the animal is in gestation (Optional)
		"input_date": datetime, 			# Date which the animal has been registered - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Mandatory)
		"birth_date": datetime, 			# Birth date of the animal - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Optional)
		"mating_date": datetime, 			# Mating date of the animal - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Optional)
		"name": str, 						# Name of the animal (Optional)
		"weight": float, 					# Weight of the animal (Optional)
		"value": float, 					# Value of the animal (Optional)
		"mother": str, 						# Identification regarding the animal's mother (Optional)
		"father": str, 						# Identification regarding the animal's father (Optional)
		"number_teats": int, 				# The animal's number of teats, if any (Optional)
		"number_teats_left": int, 			# The animal's number of left teats, if any (Optional)
		"number_teats_right": int, 			# The animal's number of right teats, if any (Optional)
		"invoice_number": str, 				# Number that identifies the invoice uniquelly (Optional)
		"invoice_value": float, 			# Value of the invoice (Optional)
		"animal_crossbreed_uuid": str, 		# UUID of the holding's animal crossbreed (Mandatory)
		"ag_output_uuid": str, 				# UUID of the animal group output that is associated with this animal's transaction (Optional)
		"note": str, 						# Note for additional information regarding the animal (Optional)
		"animal_type": AnimalType, 			# The animal's type (Mandatory)
		"animal_stage": AnimalStage, 		# The animal's stage (Mandatory)
		"animal_txn_type": AnimalTxnType, 	# An optional parameter determining which is the type of transaction related to the animal with standard being the default one (Optional)
		"animal_status": Status, 			# The animal's current status, if it is active or inactive (Optional)
		"gender": Gender, 					# Whether the gender of the animal is male or female (Optional)
		"mating_type": AnimalMatingType, 	# Which is the animal's process of mating (Optional)
		"is_continuous": bool, 				# An optional flag determining if the event should be saved over a common animal group or a continuous one with the default behavior of saving it at the common one (Inferred: From the Entity's Events that deal with movement such as Animal Output)
		"is_origin_continuous": bool, 		# An optional flag determining if the event should be saved over a common animal group or a continuous one with the default behavior of saving it at the common one at the origin (Optional)
		"og_farm_uuid": str, 				# Unique identifier of the animal's original farm (Inferred: From the Animal's Registration and / or Updates)
		"og_animal_group_uuid": str, 		# Unique identifier of the animal's original animal group (Inferred: From the Animal's Registration and / or Updates)
		"og_facility_uuid": str, 			# Unique identifier of the animal's original facility (Inferred: From the Animal's Registration and / or Updates)
		"og_pen_uuid": str, 				# Unique identifier of the animal's original pen (Inferred: From the Animal's Registration and / or Updates)
		"og_cycle": int, 					# Which is the animal's original cycle (Inferred: From the Animal's Registration and / or Updates)

name: Animal - Swine - Sow - Empty
schema:
{
	"data": {
		"farm_uuid": str, 					# Unique identifier of the animal's farm (Inferred: From the Entity's Events that deal with movement such as Animal Output)
		"animal_group_uuid": str, 			# Unique identifier of the animal's animal group (Inferred: From the Entity's Events that deal with movement such as Animal Output)
		"uuid": str, 						# Unique identifier of the animal (Mandatory)
		"page": int, 						# Used to order documents of the animal entity (Inferred: From the Event's previous existing documents)
		"scrapped": bool, 					# Determines if the page is scrapped or not, indicating that it should be overlooked (Inferred: From the deletion of trigger Events)
		"date": datetime, 					# From which month and year this animal document holds events - %Y-%m-%d (Inferred: From the Event's reference date that was used to create the document)
		"facility_uuid": str, 				# Unique identifier of the animal's facility (Inferred: From the Entity's Events that deal with movement such as Animal Output)
		"pen_uuid": str, 					# Unique identifier of the animal's pen (Inferred: From the Entity's Events that deal with movement such as Animal Output)
		"origin_type": PartnerType, 		# Identifies the type of the origin, if any (Optional)
		"origin_uuid": str, 				# Unique identifier of the origin which provided the animal, if any (Optional)
		"ag_origin_uuid": str, 				# Unique identifier of the animal group that provided the animal (Optional)
		"fac_origin_uuid": str, 			# Unique identifier of the animal group's facility (Optional)
		"cycle": int, 						# Which is the animal's cycle (Inferred: From the Entity's trigger Events)
		"age": int, 						# Age of the animal (Optional)
		"gestation_days": int, 				# Number of days that the animal is in gestation (Optional)
		"input_date": datetime, 			# Date which the animal has been registered - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Mandatory)
		"birth_date": datetime, 			# Birth date of the animal - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Optional)
		"mating_date": datetime, 			# Mating date of the animal - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Optional)
		"name": str, 						# Name of the animal (Optional)
		"weight": float, 					# Weight of the animal (Optional)
		"value": float, 					# Value of the animal (Optional)
		"mother": str, 						# Identification regarding the animal's mother (Optional)
		"father": str, 						# Identification regarding the animal's father (Optional)
		"number_teats": int, 				# The animal's number of teats, if any (Optional)

				"event_set": EventSet, 			# Event set of the Event being tagged (Mandatory)
				"event_uuid": str, 				# Unique identifier of the animal event (Mandatory)
				"uuid": str, 					# Unique identifier of the animal's tag event (Mandatory)
				"tag_label": str, 				# Unique label of the tag (Mandatory)
				"register_date": datetime, 		# When the animal had a tag registered to it - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Mandatory)
				"deletion_date": datetime, 		# When the animal had a tag deleted from it - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Mandatory if it has already been deleted, otherwise Optional)
				"tagging_type": TaggingType, 	# Which is the type of tag association that was used when tagging the entity (Inferred: From the Event's "type" parameter)
				"source_user": str, 			# Unique identifier of the user or application which filled in the event data (Inferred: From the Event's "source_user" parameter)
				"event_versioning": { 			# Stores versions of each event that manipulated the bucket's entry directly (Inferred: From the Event's "version" parameter)
					"register": str, 			# Stores version of the only register operation that created the bucket's entry, if any (Inferred: From the Event's "version" parameter)
					"update": list[str], 		# Stores versions of the update operations that updated the bucket's entry, if any (Inferred: From the Event's "version" parameter)
					"deletion": str				# Stores version of the only deletion operation that deleted the bucket's entry, if any (Inferred: From the Event's "version" parameter)
				},
				"og_created_at": datetime, 		# Original date of creation of this data before migration - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Inferred: From the Event's "og_created_at" parameter)
				"og_updated_at": datetime, 		# Original date of update of this data before migration - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Inferred: From the Event's "og_updated_at" parameter)
				"is_deleted": bool, 			# Determines whether the tag should be considered deleted or not (Mandatory)
				"created_at": datetime, 		# When the tag was added - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Mandatory)
				"updated_at": datetime 			# When the tag was last updated - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Mandatory)
			}
		]
	}
}

name: Animal - Swine - Sow - Pregnant and Lactating
schema:
{
	"data": {
		"farm_uuid": str, 					# Unique identifier of the animal's farm (Inferred: From the Entity's Events that deal with movement such as Animal Output)
		"animal_group_uuid": str, 			# Unique identifier of the animal's animal group (Inferred: From the Entity's Events that deal with movement such as Animal Output)
		"uuid": str, 						# Unique identifier of the animal (Mandatory)
		"page": int, 						# Used to order documents of the animal entity (Inferred: From the Event's previous existing documents)
		"scrapped": bool, 					# Determines if the page is scrapped or not, indicating that it should be overlooked (Inferred: From the deletion of trigger Events)
		"date": datetime, 					# From which month and year this animal document holds events - %Y-%m-%d (Inferred: From the Event's reference date that was used to create the document)
		"facility_uuid": str, 				# Unique identifier of the animal's facility (Inferred: From the Entity's Events that deal with movement such as Animal Output)
		"pen_uuid": str, 					# Unique identifier of the animal's pen (Inferred: From the Entity's Events that deal with movement such as Animal Output)
		"origin_type": PartnerType, 		# Identifies the type of the origin, if any (Optional)
		"origin_uuid": str, 				# Unique identifier of the origin which provided the animal, if any (Optional)
		"ag_origin_uuid": str, 				# Unique identifier of the animal group that provided the animal (Optional)
		"fac_origin_uuid": str, 			# Unique identifier of the animal group's facility (Optional)

schema:
{
	"data": {

			"holding_uuid": str, 					# Unique identifier of the holding (Mandatory)

			"regions": list[str],					# Unique identifiers of the holding's regions (Optional)

		}],

		"input_prediction_quantity_female": int,	# Prediction of the number of female animals that the animal group is going to receive on an input process (Optional)

		"last_outcome_date": datetime, 				# When the animal group's last outcome process happened - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Inferred: From the Animal Group's last Output, Other Output, Loss or Transfer processes)

name: Animal Group - Poultry - Pullets
schema:
{
	"data": {
		"external_id": str, 						# An identifier used by third party services to identify the data (Optional)
		"farm_uuid": str, 							# Unique identifier of the animal group's farm (Mandatory)
		"uuid": str, 								# Unique identifier of the animal group (Mandatory)
		"site_uuid": str, 							# Unique identifier of the animal group's site (Optional)
		"ag_holdings": [{ 							# The list of holdings that are associated with the animal group (Optional) 
			"holding_uuid": str, 					# Unique identifier of the holding (Mandatory)
			"account_uuid": str,					# Unique identifier of the holding's account (Optional)
			"regions": list[str],					# Unique identifiers of the holding's regions (Optional)
			"producers": list[str],					# Unique identifiers of the holding's producers (Optional)
			"technicians": list[str],				# Unique identifiers of the holding's technicians (Optional)
			"lead_technician_uuid": str, 			# Which is the animal group's supervising technician between all of its registered ones (Optional)
			"is_holder": bool 						# If the holding is the one that originated the animal group or not (Mandatory)
		}],
		"name": str, 								# Name of the animal group (Optional)
		"opening_date": datetime,					# When the animal group has been opened - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Mandatory)
		"closing_date": datetime, 					# When the animal group has been closed - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Optional)
		"input_prediction_date": datetime, 			# Prediction of when the animal group is going to receive an input process - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Optional)
		"input_prediction_quantity": int, 			# Prediction of the number of animals that the animal group is going to receive on an input process (Optional)
		"input_prediction_quantity_male": int, 		# Prediction of the number of male animals that the animal group is going to receive on an input process (Optional)
		"input_prediction_quantity_female": int,	# Prediction of the number of female animals that the animal group is going to receive on an input process (Optional)
		"output_prediction_date": datetime, 		# Prediction of when the animal group is going to receive an output process - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Optional)
		"technicians": list[str],					# List of veterinarian and assistant technicians responsible for the animal group (Optional)
		"animal_crossbreed_uuid": str, 				# UUID of the holding's animal crossbreed (Optional)
		"output_prediction_uuid": str, 				# UUID of the animal group's predicted output (Optional)
		"sequence_ag_uuid": str, 					# UUID of the sequence of animal groups that this animal group is associated to (Optional)
		"lead_technician_uuid": str, 				# Which is the animal group's supervising technician between all of its registered ones (Optional)
		"h_consumption_sch_uuid": str, 				# Which is the consumption schedule associated with this animal group (Optional)
		"h_nutrition_type_uuid": str, 				# Which is the nutrition type associated with this animal group (Optional)
		"status": AnimalGroupStatus, 				# Whether the animal group is planned, opened or closed (Optional)
		"production_stage": ProductionStage, 		# Based on the species and production stage which are taken care of on the animal group (Mandatory)
		"gender": GroupGender,	 					# Whether the gender of the animal's are not defined, all male, all female or mixed (Optional)
		"animal_type": AnimalType, 					# Based on the animal type that is gonna be outputted by the animal group at its closure (Optional)
		"source_user": str, 						# Unique identifier of the user or application which filled in the event data (Inferred: From the Event's "source_user" parameter)
		"event_versioning": { 						# Stores versions of each event that manipulated the Entity directly (Inferred: From the Event's "version" parameter)
			"register": str, 						# Stores version of the only register operation that created the Entity, if any (Inferred: From the Event's "version" parameter)

			"reprocess": list[str] 					# Stores versions of the reprocess operations that reprocessed the Entity, if any (Inferred: From the Event's "version" parameter)
		},

		"og_updated_at": datetime, 					# Original date of update of this data before migration - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Inferred: From the Event's "og_updated_at" parameter)
		"holding_uuid": str,						# Unique identifier of the animal group's holding (Inferred: From the Animal Group's holdings or from its Farm)
		"holdings": list[str],						# Unique identifiers of the animal group's holdings (Inferred: From the Animal Group's holdings or from its Farm)
		"regions": list[str],						# Unique identifiers of the animal group's regions (Inferred: From the Animal Group's holdings or from its Farm)
		"producers": list[str],						# Unique identifiers of the animal group's producers (Inferred: From the Animal Group's holdings or from its Farm)
		"farm_name": str,							# The animal group's farm name (Inferred: From the Animal Group's Farm)
		"production_species": ProductionSpecies, 	# Informs the production species which are taken care of on the animal group (Inferred: Based on the Animal Group's "production_stage" parameter)

		"facilities": list[str], 					# List with the unique identifiers of the animal group's facilities (Inferred: From the Animal Group's Distribution processes)
		"input_third_parties": list[str], 			# List with the unique identifiers of the animal group's input origins from third parties (Inferred: From the Animal Group's Input processes' "origin_uuid" parameters with "origin_type" parameters equal to THIRD_PARTY)
		"input_corporations": list[str], 			# List with the unique identifiers of the animal group's input origins from inner corporations (Inferred: From the Animal Group's Input processes' "origin_uuid" parameters with "origin_type" parameters equal to CORPORATION)
		"output_third_parties": list[str], 			# List with the unique identifiers of the animal group's output destinations from third parties (Inferred: From the Animal Group's Output processes' "destination_uuid" parameters with "destination_type" parameters equal to THIRD_PARTY)
		"output_corporations": list[str], 			# List with the unique identifiers of the animal group's output destinations from inner corporations (Inferred: From the Animal Group's Output processes' "destination_uuid" parameters with "destination_type" parameters equal to CORPORATION)
		"total_facilities_area": float, 			# Total area of the animal group's facilities (Inferred: Sum of the Animal Group's Facilities' "total_area" parameters)
		"first_input_date": datetime, 				# When the animal group's first input process happened - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Inferred: From the Animal Group's first Input process)
		"first_input_cfm_date": datetime, 			# When the animal group's first input confirmation process happened - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Inferred: From the Animal Group's first Input Confirmation process)
		"last_output_date": datetime, 				# When the animal group's last output process happened - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Inferred: From the Animal Group's last Output process)
		"last_output_cfm_date": datetime, 			# When the animal group's last output confirmation process happened - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Inferred: From the Animal Group's last Output Confirmation process)
		"last_outcome_date": datetime, 				# When the animal group's last outcome process happened - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Inferred: From the Animal Group's last Output, Other Output, Loss or Transfer processes)
		"animal_stock": [{ 							# Holds stock information regarding the stock of animals (Inferred: From the Animal Group's Distribution, Redistribution, Transfer, Output, Other Output and Loss events)
			"facility_uuid": str, 					# Unique identifier of the facility that has the animals (Mandatory)
			"total_facility": int, 					# Total number of animals in stock for a given facility (Mandatory)
			"pens": [{
				"pen_uuid": str, 					# Unique identifier of the pen that has the animals (Mandatory)
				"total_pen": int, 					# Total number of animals in stock for a given pen (Mandatory)
				"categories": [{
					"category_uuid": str, 			# Unique identifier of the category that the animals are from (Mandatory)
					"total_category": int, 			# Total number of animals in stock for a given category (Mandatory)
					"genders": [{
						"gender": GroupGender,	 	# Whether the gender of the animals are not defined, all male, all female or mixed (Mandatory)
						"total_gender": int 		# Total number of animals in stock for a given facility, pen and gender (Mandatory)
					}]
				}],
				"genders": [{
					"gender": GroupGender,	 		# Whether the gender of the animals are not defined, all male, all female or mixed (Mandatory)
					"total_gender": int 			# Total number of animals in stock for a given facility, pen and gender (Mandatory)
				}]
			}],
			"categories": [{
				"category_uuid": str, 				# Unique identifier of the category that the animals are from (Mandatory)
				"total_category": int, 				# Total number of animals in stock for a given category (Mandatory)
				"genders": [{
					"gender": GroupGender,	 		# Whether the gender of the animals are not defined, all male, all female or mixed (Mandatory)
					"total_gender": int 			# Total number of animals in stock for a given facility, pen and gender (Mandatory)
				}]
			}],
			"genders": [{
				"gender": GroupGender,	 			# Whether the gender of the animals are not defined, all male, all female or mixed (Mandatory)
				"total_gender": int 				# Total number of animals in stock for a given facility and gender (Mandatory)
			}]
		}],
		"total_balance": int, 						# Total balance of animals (Inferred: Subtracting "total_output", "total_other_outputs" and total_losses" from "total_input")
		"total_balance_confirmation": int, 			# Total balance of animals considering the confirmations Event sets (Inferred: Subtracting "total_output_confirmation", "total_other_outputs" and total_losses" from "total_input_confirmation")
		"total_animals": int, 						# Total number of alive animals (Inferred: Subtracting "total_losses" from "total_input")
		"total_animals_male": int, 					# Total number of alive male animals (Inferred: Subtracting MALE "total_losses" from MALE "total_input")
		"total_animals_female": int, 				# Total number of alive female animals (Inferred: Subtracting FEMALE "total_losses" from FEMALE "total_input")
		"total_input": int, 						# Total number of animals brought to the animal group (Inferred: Sum of the Animal Group's Input processes "quantity" parameters)

		"total_input_female": int, 					# Total number of female animals brought to the animal group (Inferred: Sum of the Animal Group's Input processes FEMALE "quantity" parameters)

		"total_input_confirmation_female": int, 	# Total number of female animals confirmed that were brought to the animal group (Inferred: Sum of the Animal Group's Input Confirmation processes FEMALE "quantity" parameters)

		"total_output_female": int, 				# Total number of female animals sold from the animal group (Inferred: Sum of the Animal Group's Output processes FEMALE "quantity" parameters)

		"total_losses_transport_male": int, 		# Total number of lost at transport male animals (Inferred: Sum of the Animal Group's Loss at Transport processes MALE "quantity" parameters)
		"total_losses_transport_female": int, 		# Total number of lost at transport female animals (Inferred: Sum of the Animal Group's Loss at Transport processes FEMALE "quantity" parameters)
		"total_weight": float, 						# Total weight of all sold animals (Inferred: Sum of the Animal Group's Output processes "total_weight" parameters)

name: Continuous Animal Group - Swine - Breeding Herd
schema:
{
	"data": {
		"external_id": str, 						# An identifier used by third party services to identify the data (Optional)
		"farm_uuid": str, 							# Unique identifier of the animal group's farm (Mandatory)
		"uuid": str, 								# Unique identifier of the animal group (Mandatory)
		"ag_holdings": [{ 							# The list of holdings that are associated with the animal group (Optional) 
			"holding_uuid": str, 					# Unique identifier of the holding (Mandatory)
			"account_uuid": str,					# Unique identifier of the holding's account (Optional)
			"regions": list[str],					# Unique identifiers of the holding's regions (Optional)
			"producers": list[str],					# Unique identifiers of the holding's producers (Optional)
			"technicians": list[str],				# Unique identifiers of the holding's technicians (Optional)
			"lead_technician_uuid": str, 			# Which is the animal group's supervising technician between all of its registered ones (Optional)
			"is_holder": bool 						# If the holding is the one that originated the animal group or not (Mandatory)
		}],
		"date": datetime, 							# From which month and year this continuous animal group document holds events - %Y-%m-%d (Inferred: From current date)
		"name": str, 								# Name of the animal group (Optional)
		"technicians": list[str],					# List of veterinarian and assistant technicians responsible for the animal group (Optional)
		"lead_technician_uuid": str, 				# Which is the continuous animal group's supervising technician between all of its registered ones (Optional)
		"note": str, 								# Note for additional information regarding the animal group (Optional)
		"production_stage": ProductionStage, 		# Based on the species and production stage which are taken care of on the animal group (Mandatory)
		"continuous_ag_type": AnimalGroupRole, 		# Type of the continuous animal group (Optional)
		"source_user": str, 						# Unique identifier of the user or application which filled in the event data (Inferred: From the Event's "source_user" parameter)
		"event_versioning": { 						# Stores versions of each event that manipulated the Entity directly (Inferred: From the Event's "version" parameter)
			"register": str, 						# Stores version of the only register operation that created the Entity, if any (Inferred: From the Event's "version" parameter)
			"update": list[str], 					# Stores versions of the update operations that updated the Entity, if any (Inferred: From the Event's "version" parameter)
			"deletion": str,						# Stores version of the only deletion operation that deleted the Entity, if any (Inferred: From the Event's "version" parameter)
			"reprocess": list[str] 					# Stores versions of the reprocess operations that reprocessed the Entity, if any (Inferred: From the Event's "version" parameter)
		},
		"og_created_at": datetime, 					# Original date of creation of this data before migration - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Inferred: From the Event's "og_created_at" parameter)
		"og_updated_at": datetime, 					# Original date of update of this data before migration - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Inferred: From the Event's "og_updated_at" parameter)
		"holding_uuid": str,						# Unique identifier of the animal group's holding (Inferred: From the Continuous Animal Group's holdings or from its Farm)
		"holdings": list[str],						# Unique identifiers of the animal group's holdings (Inferred: From the Continuous Animal Group's holdings or from its Farm)
		"regions": list[str],						# Unique identifiers of the animal group's regions (Inferred: From the Continuous Animal Group's holdings or from its Farm)
		"producers": list[str],						# Unique identifiers of the animal group's producers (Inferred: From the Continuous Animal Group's holdings or from its Farm)
		"farm_name": str,							# The animal group's farm name (Inferred: From the Continuous Animal Group's Farm)
		"production_species": ProductionSpecies, 	# Informs the production species which are taken care of on the animal group (Inferred: Based on the Continuous Animal Group's "production_stage" parameter)
		"facilities": list[str], 					# List with the unique identifiers of the animal group's facilities (Inferred: From the Continuous Animal Group's Distribution processes)
		"total_facilities_area": float, 			# Total area of the animal group's facilities (Inferred: Sum of the Continuous Animal Group's Facilities' "total_area" parameters)
		"total_animals": int, 						# Total number of alive and active animals (Inferred: From the Continuous Animal Group's Animals)
		"total_males": int, 						# Total number of alive and active male animals (Inferred: From the Continuous Animal Group's Animals of the "MALE" animal type)
		"total_females": int, 						# Total number of alive and active female animals (Inferred: From the Continuous Animal Group's Animals of the "GILT" and "SOW" animal types)
		"total_gilts": int, 						# Total number of alive and active sow animals (Inferred: From the Continuous Animal Group's Animals of the "GILT" animal type)
		"total_sows": int, 							# Total number of alive and active sow animals (Inferred: From the Continuous Animal Group's Animals of the SOW" animal type)
		"total_empty_sows": int, 					# Total number of alive, active and empty sow animals (Inferred: From the Continuous Animal Group's Animals of the "SOW" animal type and "EMPTY" animal stage)
		"total_pregnant_sows": int, 				# Total number of alive, active and pregnant sow animals (Inferred: From the Continuous Animal Group's Animals of the "SOW" animal type and "PREGNANT" animal stage)
		"total_lactating_sows": int, 				# Total number of alive, active and pregnant sow animals (Inferred: From the Continuous Animal Group's Animals of the "SOW" animal type and "LACTATING" or "PREGNANT_AND_LACTATING" animal stages)
		"total_unweaned_piglets": int, 				# Total number of unweaned piglet animals (Inferred: From the Continuous Animal Group's Animals and its Offspring Adjustment Events)
		"total_weaned_piglets": int, 				# Total number of weaned piglet animals (Inferred: From the Continuous Animal Group's Animals)
		"offspring_outputs": [
			{
				"uuid": str, 						# Unique identifier of the animal group's offspring output event (Mandatory)
				"destination_type": PartnerType,	# Identifies the type of the destination, if any (Optional)
				"destination_uuid": str, 			# Unique identifier of the destination which received the animals of the animal group, if any (Optional)
				"date": datetime, 					# When the animal group received an offspring output process - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Mandatory)
				"offspring_groups": [{ 				# List of offspring outputs per offspring group (Mandatory)
					"offspring_grp_uuid": str, 		# Unique identifier of the offspring group associated with the animals (Mandatory)
					"quantity": int, 				# Number of animals that were sent to this destination (Mandatory)
					"total_off_weight": float, 		# Total weight of all outputted offsprings (Optional)
					"average_off_weight": float 	# Average weight of all outputted offsprings (Optional)
				}],
				"total_weight": float, 				# Total animal weight of all of the outputted animals (Optional)
				"invoice_number": str, 				# Number that identifies the invoice uniquelly (Optional)
				"invoice_value": float, 			# Value of the invoice (Optional)
				"gta_number": str, 					# Number that identifies the GTA uniquelly (Optional)
				"animals": list[str], 				# UUID list of the animals that were outputted (Optional)
				"note": str, 						# Note for additional information regarding the animal offspring output (Optional)
				"ag_txn_type": AnimalGroupTxnType, 	# An optional parameter determining which is the type of transaction of the offspring output (Mandatory)
				"source_user": str, 				# Unique identifier of the user or application which filled in the event data (Inferred: From the Event's "source_user" parameter)
				"event_versioning": { 				# Stores versions of each event that manipulated the bucket's entry directly (Inferred: From the Event's "version" parameter)
					"register": str, 				# Stores version of the only register operation that created the bucket's entry, if any (Inferred: From the Event's "version" parameter)

				"og_updated_at": datetime, 			# Original date of update of this data before migration - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Inferred: From the Event's "og_updated_at" parameter)
				"is_deleted": bool, 				# Determines whether the offspring output should be considered deleted or not (Mandatory)
				"created_at": datetime, 			# When the offspring output was added - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Mandatory)

			}
		],

					"register": str, 				# Stores version of the only register operation that created the bucket's entry, if any (Inferred: From the Event's "version" parameter)

					"deletion": str					# Stores version of the only deletion operation that deleted the bucket's entry, if any (Inferred: From the Event's "version" parameter)

				"og_updated_at": datetime, 			# Original date of update of this data before migration - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Inferred: From the Event's "og_updated_at" parameter)
				"is_deleted": bool, 				# Determines whether the annotation should be considered deleted or not (Mandatory)
				"created_at": datetime, 			# When the annotation was added - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Mandatory)
				"updated_at": datetime 				# When the annotation was last updated - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Mandatory)
			}
		],
		"tags": [
			{
				"uuid": str, 					# Unique identifier of the animal group's tag event (Mandatory)
				"tag_label": str, 				# Unique label of the tag (Mandatory)
				"register_date": datetime, 		# When the animal group had a tag registered to it - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Mandatory)
				"deletion_date": datetime, 		# When the animal group had a tag deleted from it - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Mandatory if it has already been deleted, otherwise Optional)
				"tagging_type": TaggingType, 	# Which is the type of tag association that was used when tagging the entity (Inferred: From the Event's "type" parameter)
				"source_user": str, 			# Unique identifier of the user or application which filled in the event data (Inferred: From the Event's "source_user" parameter)
				"event_versioning": { 			# Stores versions of each event that manipulated the bucket's entry directly (Inferred: From the Event's "version" parameter)
					"register": str, 			# Stores version of the only register operation that created the bucket's entry, if any (Inferred: From the Event's "version" parameter)
					"update": list[str], 		# Stores versions of the update operations that updated the bucket's entry, if any (Inferred: From the Event's "version" parameter)
					"deletion": str				# Stores version of the only deletion operation that deleted the bucket's entry, if any (Inferred: From the Event's "version" parameter)

				"og_created_at": datetime, 		# Original date of creation of this data before migration - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Inferred: From the Event's "og_created_at" parameter)
				"og_updated_at": datetime, 		# Original date of update of this data before migration - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Inferred: From the Event's "og_updated_at" parameter)

				"created_at": datetime, 		# When the tag was added - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Mandatory)

			}
		]
	}

name: Continuous Animal Group - Swine - Early Nursery, Nursery, Finishing and Wean to Finish
schema:
{
	"data": {
		"external_id": str, 						# An identifier used by third party services to identify the data (Optional)
		"farm_uuid": str, 							# Unique identifier of the animal group's farm (Mandatory)
		"uuid": str, 								# Unique identifier of the animal group (Mandatory)
		"ag_holdings": [{ 							# The list of holdings that are associated with the animal group (Optional) 
			"holding_uuid": str, 					# Unique identifier of the holding (Mandatory)
			"account_uuid": str,					# Unique identifier of the holding's account (Optional)
			"regions": list[str],					# Unique identifiers of the holding's regions (Optional)
			"producers": list[str],					# Unique identifiers of the holding's producers (Optional)
			"technicians": list[str],				# Unique identifiers of the holding's technicians (Optional)
			"lead_technician_uuid": str, 			# Which is the animal group's supervising technician between all of its registered ones (Optional)
			"is_holder": bool 						# If the holding is the one that originated the animal group or not (Mandatory)
		}],
		"date": datetime, 							# From which month and year this continuous animal group document holds events - %Y-%m-%d (Inferred: From current date)
		"name": str, 								# Name of the animal group (Optional)
		"technicians": list[str],					# List of veterinarian and assistant technicians responsible for the animal group (Optional)
		"lead_technician_uuid": str, 				# Which is the continuous animal group's supervising technician between all of its registered ones (Optional)
		"note": str, 								# Note for additional information regarding the animal group (Optional)
		"production_stage": ProductionStage, 		# Based on the species and production stage which are taken care of on the animal group (Mandatory)
		"continuous_ag_type": AnimalGroupRole, 		# Type of the continuous animal group (Optional)
		"source_user": str, 						# Unique identifier of the user or application which filled in the event data (Inferred: From the Event's "source_user" parameter)
		"event_versioning": { 						# Stores versions of each event that manipulated the Entity directly (Inferred: From the Event's "version" parameter)
			"register": str, 						# Stores version of the only register operation that created the Entity, if any (Inferred: From the Event's "version" parameter)
			"update": list[str], 					# Stores versions of the update operations that updated the Entity, if any (Inferred: From the Event's "version" parameter)
			"deletion": str,						# Stores version of the only deletion operation that deleted the Entity, if any (Inferred: From the Event's "version" parameter)
			"reprocess": list[str] 					# Stores versions of the reprocess operations that reprocessed the Entity, if any (Inferred: From the Event's "version" parameter)
		},
		"og_created_at": datetime, 					# Original date of creation of this data before migration - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Inferred: From the Event's "og_created_at" parameter)
		"og_updated_at": datetime, 					# Original date of update of this data before migration - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Inferred: From the Event's "og_updated_at" parameter)
		"holding_uuid": str,						# Unique identifier of the animal group's holding (Inferred: From the Continuous Animal Group's holdings or from its Farm)
		"holdings": list[str],						# Unique identifiers of the animal group's holdings (Inferred: From the Continuous Animal Group's holdings or from its Farm)
		"regions": list[str],						# Unique identifiers of the animal group's regions (Inferred: From the Continuous Animal Group's holdings or from its Farm)
		"producers": list[str],						# Unique identifiers of the animal group's producers (Inferred: From the Continuous Animal Group's holdings or from its Farm)
		"farm_name": str,							# The animal group's farm name (Inferred: From the Continuous Animal Group's Farm)
		"production_species": ProductionSpecies, 	# Informs the production species which are taken care of on the animal group (Inferred: Based on the Continuous Animal Group's "production_stage" parameter)
		"facilities": list[str], 					# List with the unique identifiers of the animal group's facilities (Inferred: From the Continuous Animal Group's Distribution processes)
		"total_facilities_area": float, 			# Total area of the animal group's facilities (Inferred: Sum of the Continuous Animal Group's Facilities' "total_area" parameters)
		"first_input_date": datetime, 				# When the animal group's first input process happened - %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z (UTC+0) (Inferred: From the Continuous Animal Group's first Input process)
		"animal_stock": [{ 							# Holds stock information regarding the stock of animals (Inferred: From the Animal Group's Distribution, Transfer, Output, Other Output and Loss events)
			"facility_uuid": str, 					# Unique identifier of the facility that has the animals (Mandatory)
			"total_facility": int, 					# Total number of animals in stock for a given facility (Mandatory)
			"pens": [{
				"pen_uuid": str, 					# Unique identifier of the pen that has the animals (Mandatory)
				"total_pen": int, 					# Total number of animals in stock for a given pen (Mandatory)
				"categories": [{
					"category_uuid": str, 			# Unique identifier of the category that the animals are from (Mandatory)
					"total_category": int, 			# Total number of animals in stock for a given category (Mandatory)
					"genders": [{
						"gender": GroupGender, 	 	# Whether the gender of the animals are not defined, all male, all female or mixed (Mandatory)
						"total_gender": int 		# Total number of animals in stock for a given facility, pen and gender (Mandatory)
					}]
				}],
				"genders": [{
					"gender": GroupGender, 	 		# Whether the gender of the animals are not defined, all male, all female or mixed (Mandatory)
					"total_gender": int 			# Total number of animals in stock for a given facility, pen and gender (Mandatory)
				}]
			}],
			"categories": [{
				"category_uuid": str, 				# Unique identifier of the category that the animals are from (Mandatory)
				"total_category": int, 				# Total number of animals in stock for a given category (Mandatory)
				"genders": [{
					"gender": GroupGender, 	 		# Whether the gender of the animals are not defined, all male, all female or mixed (Mandatory)
					"total_gender": int 			# Total number of animals in stock for a given facility, pen and gender (Mandatory)
				}]
			}],
			"genders": [{
				"gender": GroupGender, 	 			# Whether the gender of the animals are not defined, all male, all female or mixed (Mandatory)
				"total_gender": int 				# Total number of animals in stock for a given facility and gender (Mandatory)
			}]
		}],
		"total_balance": int, 						# Total balance of animals (Inferred: Subtracting "total_output", "total_other_outputs" and total_losses" from "total_input")
		"total_animals": int, 						# Total number of alive animals (Inferred: Subtracting "total_losses" from "total_input")
		"total_input": int, 						# Total number of animals brought to the animal group (Inferred: Sum of the Continuous Animal Group's Input processes "quantity" parameters)
		"total_output": int, 						# Total number of animals sold from the animal group (Inferred: Sum of the Continuous Animal Group's Output processes "quantity" parameters)
		"total_other_outputs": int, 					# Total number of animals that were not sold from the animal group (Inferred: Sum of the Continuous Animal Group's Other Output processes "quantity" parameters)
		"total_losses": int, 						# Total number of lost animals (Inferred: Sum of the Continuous Animal Group's Loss processes "quantity" parameters)
		"total_deaths": int, 						# Total number of dead animals (Inferred: Sum of the Continuous Animal Group's Loss processes with DEATH types "quantity" parameters)
		"total_disposals": int, 					# Total number of disposed animals (Inferred: Sum of the Continuous Animal Group's Loss processes with DISPOSAL types "quantity" parameters)
		"inputs": [
			{
				"external_id": str, 				# An identifier used by third party services to identify the data (Optional)
				"uuid": str, 						# Unique identifier of the animal group's input event (Mandatory)
				"origin_type": PartnerType,			# Identifies the type of the origin, if any (Optional)
				"origin_uuid": str, 				# Unique identifier of the origin which provided the animals for the animal group, if any (Optional)
